revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Samoa%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Rather than redirecting {{tl|Country data Western Samoa}} to {{tl|Country data Samoa}}, the former template transcludes the latter and passes through all parameters. The linked article will always be "Samoa", but the displayed name is either "Western Samoa" or "Samoa" based on which of the two templates is used, even in templates that usually have a fixed default display name (such as {{tl|flag country}} and {{tl|fb}}). This allows for "Western Samoa" to be used in historical contexts without having to also set {{para|name}}. The variants from {{tl|Country data Samoa}} can be used with both templates. ====Examples==== {|class="wikitable" ! Template !! Samoa output !! Western Samoa output |- | {{tlx|flag|SAM}} || {{flag|Samoa}} || {{flag|Western Samoa}} |- | {{tlx|flag|SAM|colonial}} || {{flag|Samoa|colonial}} || {{flag|Western Samoa|colonial}} |- | {{tlx|flag country|SAM}} || {{flag country|Samoa}} || {{flag country|Western Samoa}} |- | {{tlx|flag icon|SAM}} || {{flag icon|Samoa}} || {{flag icon|Western Samoa}} |- | {{tlx|bk|SAM}} || {{bk|Samoa}} || {{bk|Western Samoa}} |- | {{tlx|fb|SAM}} || {{fb|Samoa}} || {{fb|Western Samoa}} |} ====Redirects to Template:Country data Samoa==== * {{noredirect|Template:Country data SAM}} ====Redirects to Template:Country data Western Samoa==== * {{noredirect|Template:Country data WSM}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Samoa]] [[Category:Country data templates of Samoa| ]] [[Category:Samoa templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24919637890|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Rather than redirecting {{tl|Country data Western Samoa}} to {{tl|Country data Samoa}}, the former template transcludes the latter and passes through all parameters. The linked article will always be "Samoa", but the displayed name is either "Western Samoa" or "Samoa" based on which of the two templates is used, even in templates that usually have a fixed default display name (such as {{tl|flag country}} and {{tl|fb}}). This allows for "Western Samoa" to be used in historical contexts without having to also set {{para|name}}. The variants from {{tl|Country data Samoa}} can be used with both templates. ====Examples==== {|class="wikitable" ! Template !! Samoa output !! Western Samoa output |- | {{tlx|flag|SAM}} || {{flag|Samoa}} || {{flag|Western Samoa}} |- | {{tlx|flag|SAM|colonial}} || {{flag|Samoa|colonial}} || {{flag|Western Samoa|colonial}} |- | {{tlx|flag country|SAM}} || {{flag country|Samoa}} || {{flag country|Western Samoa}} |- | {{tlx|flag icon|SAM}} || {{flag icon|Samoa}} || {{flag icon|Western Samoa}} |- | {{tlx|bk|SAM}} || {{bk|Samoa}} || {{bk|Western Samoa}} |- | {{tlx|fb|SAM}} || {{fb|Samoa}} || {{fb|Western Samoa}} |} ====Redirects to Template:Country data Samoa==== * {{noredirect|Template:Country data SAM}} ====Redirects to Template:Country data Western Samoa==== * {{noredirect|Template:Country data WSM}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Country data templates of countries|Samoa]] [[Category:Country data templates of Samoa| ]] [[Category:Samoa templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
